plugin.name: KNX Project Maven Plugin
plugin.description: Generates Java source code (Calimero GroupAddress constants) from an ETS .knxproj file.

parameter.name: className
parameter.description: Simple class name of the generated class.

parameter.name: groupAddressClass
parameter.description: Fully-qualified class name of the Calimero GroupAddress type to use in the generated code. Change this if you use a forked or repackaged version of Calimero.

parameter.name: knxprojFile
parameter.description: Path to the ETS project file (.knxproj).

parameter.name: outputDirectory
parameter.description: Output directory for the generated Java source file. The file is placed in the correct sub-directory according to packageName automatically.

parameter.name: packageName
parameter.description: Java package for the generated class, e.g. com.example.knx.

mojo.description:
Display help information on knxproj-maven-plugin.
Call mvn knxproj:help -Ddetail=true -Dgoal=<goal-name> to display parameter details.

parameter.name: detail
parameter.description: If true, display all settable properties for each goal.

parameter.name: goal
parameter.description: The name of the goal for which to show help. If unspecified, all goals will be displayed.

parameter.name: indentSize
parameter.description: The number of spaces per indentation level, should be positive.

parameter.name: lineLength
parameter.description: The maximum length of a display line, should be positive.
